privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic running pace analysis task using LibreOffice Calc. The dataset contains 15 synthetic running records with dates from 2024-01-05 to 2024-02-08, including 7 Easy runs, 5 Tempo runs, and 3 Long runs. Data is intentionally messy with mixed distance units (10 rows in miles, 5 in km) and three different time formats (7 HH:MM:SS entries, 5 decimal minutes, 3 decimal hours), plus 1 row with missing elevation gain. All calculated paces range from 8.14 to 9.90 min/mile, with verified averages: Easy 8.53, Tempo 9.04, Long 9.82 min/mile—all within the realistic 5-15 min/mile bound. The task requires 180 seconds with max 15 steps at medium difficulty. Success requires 70% (5/7) of criteria: distance standardization using km×0.621371 conversion formula, time standardization to decimal minutes, pace calculation (Time_Minutes÷Distance_Miles), correct formulas (not hardcoded), summary analysis with AVERAGE functions, conditional formatting, and data quality checks. The verifier uses test rows 2-4 for formula validation with 0.5-minute and 0.1 min/mile tolerances.
